display_description.he: קורס בן 6 פרקים על תגמולי מילואים במיקוד על עצמאים: איך מחושב התגמול, מענק רשות המסים לעוסקים, מענקי שירות ארוך, הגנת תעסוקה, ואיך תובעים כל שקל שמגיע לכם.
display_description.en: A 6-chapter course on Israeli miluim pay for the self-employed: how tagmul is calculated, the Tax Authority business grant, and how to claim what you are owed.

who_is_this_for.he: משרתי מילואים, ובמיוחד עצמאים ובעלי עסקים, שרוצים להבין בדיוק מה מגיע להם על השירות ואיך לתבוע כל שקל בלי להשאיר כסף על השולחן.
who_is_this_for.en: Israeli reservists, and especially the self-employed and business owners, who want to understand exactly what reserve duty pays and how to claim every shekel.

he: לזהות אם אתם על מסלול השכיר או מסלול העצמאי, ומה זה דורש מכם
לחשב את התגמול היומי שלכם מול התקרה והרצפה, ולוודא שקיבלתם נכון
לתבוע את מענק רשות המסים לעוסקים משרתי מילואים שרובם מפספסים
לאתר את מדרגת מענק השירות הארוך שמגיעה לכם לפי מספר הימים
לדעת את חלון 12 החודשים לתביעה ואת סדר הפעולות לגבייה מלאה
en: Identify whether you are on the employee or self-employed track and what it requires
Calculate your daily tagmul against the cap and floor and verify you were paid correctly
Claim the Tax Authority business grant for reservists that most self-employed miss
Find the long-service grant tier you earned based on your days served
Know the 12-month claim window and the order of operations to collect everything

images.alt_he: מסלול השכיר מול מסלול העצמאי בתשלום תגמול מילואים
images.alt_en: Employee track versus self-employed track for reserve pay
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a central institutional building icon (representing Bituach Leumi) with two arrow paths leading to a single person icon. The TOP path passes through a small briefcase icon (employer) before reaching the person, with the arrow direction shown. The BOTTOM path goes directly from the building to the person, with a small form/document icon on the line. Navy linework, one Israeli-blue accent on the two arrow paths, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, no text labels, no faces beyond a simple head-and-shoulders glyph.

images.alt_en: The daily tagmul ceiling and floor
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a single vertical bar centered between two horizontal reference lines. The TOP line is labeled with the numeral 1,730 and a tiny up-arrow (ceiling). The BOTTOM line is labeled with the numeral 329 and a tiny down-arrow (floor). The bar sits between them. Navy lines and bar, Israeli-blue accent on the two reference lines, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, the only text is the two numerals.

images.alt_he: חישוב תגמול לעצמאי: מקדמות שלושה חודשים חלקי תשעים, בתוספת אחוז
images.alt_en: Self-employed tagmul: prior installments divided by ninety plus a supplement
images.prompt: Editorial illustration showing a left-to-right calculation flow with three stages connected by arrows. Stage 1: three small stacked rectangles (representing 3 months of installments). Stage 2: a division symbol with the numeral 90. Stage 3: a plus symbol with the text '25%'. Navy icons and arrows, one Israeli-blue accent on the +25% stage, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, the only text is '90' and '25%'.

images.alt_he: המסלול הישן שנסגר מול מענק רשות המסים הפעיל
images.alt_en: The closed IDF scheme versus the active Tax Authority grant
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: two doorway shapes side by side. The LEFT doorway has a muted-gray X mark over it (closed). The RIGHT doorway is open with a small Israeli-blue checkmark beside it (active). Navy door outlines, gray X on the left, Israeli-blue check on the right, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, no text labels.

images.alt_he: סולם מענק השירות הארוך לפי ימי מילואים
images.alt_en: The additional-grant ladder by reserve days served
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: an ascending four-step staircase climbing left to right. Each step is labeled with a grant amount numeral in navy: step 1 '1,452', step 2 '2,904', step 3 '4,356', step 4 '5,808'. The tallest step (5,808) has a small Israeli-blue flag or marker on top. Navy step outlines, single Israeli-blue accent on the top marker, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, the only text is the four numerals.

Editorial illustration: a shield icon centered over a small briefcase icon, conveying protection of employment. Navy shield and briefcase outlines, one Israeli-blue accent stripe across the shield, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, no text labels, no faces.

Editorial illustration: a horizontal path with five numbered circular nodes (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) connected by a single directional arrow line, representing a sequence of claim steps. Each node has a tiny distinct glyph (a document, a building, a second building, a ladder, a return-arrow). Navy node outlines and glyphs, Israeli-blue accent on the connecting line, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, the only text is the numerals 1 to 5.

images.alt_he: מועדי תביעת תגמול מילואים במבט אחד
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: two circular clock-dial icons side by side. The LEFT dial is labeled with the numeral 12 and a tiny 'mo' (the 12-month claim window). The RIGHT dial is smaller, labeled with the numeral 30 and a tiny 'd' (the 30-day protected-money window). Navy dial outlines, Israeli-blue accent arcs, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, the only text is '12 mo' and '30 d'.
